T.C Ticaret Bakanlığı İhracat Genel Müdü: By the T.C. Ministry of Commerce General Directorate of Exports, our companies' participation in international trade fairs and organizers' promotion expenses are supported within the scope of the "Decision No. 2017/4 Regarding the Support of Participants in Fairs Held Abroad". In this context, individual participation of our companies in sectoral international fairs determined and announced by the Ministry, as well as national participation in fairs organized by authorized organizers and participation in prestigious fairs leading in their sectors are supported in certain items and in varying amounts.
Kosgeb Kanunu uyarınca. 18.11.2005 tarih: In accordance with the KOSGEB Law, multifaceted development and support programs are implemented for small and medium-sized enterprises defined by the Regulation on the Definition and Classification of SMEs published in the Official Gazette dated 18.11.2005 and numbered 25997.

6698 Sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması: In accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK"), as ISTexpo Fuarcılık Hizmetleri Ltd. Şti. ("Company"), in the capacity of data controller, we would like to state that your personal data will be recorded, stored, preserved, updated, rearranged within the framework explained below, may be disclosed to third parties in cases and to the extent permitted by the legislation, transferred, classified and processed in other ways listed in the KVKK.
Kişisel verileriniz; Şirketimiz tarafınd: Your personal data is processed for the purposes of carrying out the necessary work by our business units to benefit you from the products and services offered by our Company, customizing our products and services according to your tastes, usage habits and needs, and ensuring the legal and commercial security of our Company and the persons in business relationship with our Company.
Toplanan kişisel verileriniz; yukarıda b: Your collected personal data may be transferred to our business partners, suppliers, legally authorized public institutions and private persons in line with the realization of the above-mentioned purposes.
Kişisel Veri Sahibinin Hakları: Rights of the Personal Data Subject
As a personal data subject, in accordance with Article 11 of the KVKK; you have the rights to learn whether your data is processed, to request information if processed, to learn the purpose of processing and whether it is used in accordance with its purpose, to know the third parties to whom it is transferred domestically or abroad, and to request correction if it is incomplete or incorrectly processed.

ISTexpo Fuarcılık Hizmetleri Ltd. Şti. t: ISTexpo Trade Fairs was established in 2007 by an experienced team in trade fairs and event management.

ISTexpo Trade Fairs was established in 2007 by an experienced team in trade fairs and event management. Always attaching importance to development and innovation in the exhibition sector, ISTexpo Trade Fairs plays a role in promoting the products and services of Turkish industrialists abroad and developing exports with the fairs it organizes in countries across Europe, Asia, America, and Africa.
Şirketimiz aynı zamanda yurt içinde düze: Our company is also the 100% shareholder of İSTANBUL Restate Fair Organization Inc., which has made a name for itself with the fairs it organizes domestically. Great successes have been achieved with domestic organizations such as Istanbul Restate Real Estate Fair, Gyoder Real Estate Summits, Cityscape Turkey, All Energy Turkey, TEF Technology and Education Technologies fairs, and Migros Good Future Festival.
ISTexpo Fuarcılık, başta gayrimenkul olm: ISTexpo Trade Fairs acts as the Turkey representative for international fairs organized in nearly twenty sectors, primarily real estate, as well as promotion, medical and health, aluminum, welding, security, and machinery. In addition, ISTexpo Trade Fairs, which has an office in Düsseldorf, has the authority to organize fairs in Germany. Last year, it realized its ideal of introducing the Turkish real estate sector to Europe with the Evim Türkiye fair organized in Düsseldorf. ISTexpo Trade Fairs continues to be one of the leading companies in the sector with its creative and innovative event management services.
Takviminde bulunan yılda kırktan fazla e: ISTexpo Trade Fairs, which enables getting to know the relevant market, starting trade and developing business in dozens of countries with more than forty events in its calendar annually, is the Right Address to Establish the Right Connections with the World!
